records.description: Generative AI tool Monash presents for study and work use; public Monash pages describe text and image generation and recommend using Monash credentials.

records.costToUser: Free for students; staff cost not stated on cited public pages.

records.description: AI meeting assistant in Monash Zoom that can capture chat and audio to produce summaries, transcripts and action items.

records.description: Monash-built AI platform for simulated professional or teaching scenarios, positioned as an educational platform and active research project.

records.description: Enterprise ChatGPT offering with Columbia-managed privacy/security controls, advanced data analysis, file/document workflows, web browsing, image generation/editing, custom GPTs, and Codex-powered agents.
records.howToObtain: Request access with your Columbia UNI and chart string via Columbia ServiceNow; then log in to ChatGPT Education.
records.costToUser: $300 annually per UNI via chart string.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Pricing: $300 annually per user UNI via chart string.
